title: Maraba Tev
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:NeitherSnowNorRainNorLasers-MSW51.jpg]] |name=Maraba Tev |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]][[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Dead. Internal injuries, I think. And he's still clutching a message canister—I just hope it was worth ''this.''"
"See that he receives a hero's funeral, Jace, I'll get this canister to the General.|[[Jace]] and a fellow Rebel soldier, upon discovering Maraba Tev's body|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Maraba Tev''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Tev accepted a high-risk intelligence-gathering mission in the [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]], and uncovered information that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was developing a new [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']]. Tev was [[Death/Legends|killed]] while rushing this information back to the Rebel [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]], but moments before his passing set his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] on a course that allowed his body to be retrieved by his cohorts, still clutching the message canister he died to deliver. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 51}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 52}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Death Star Owner's Technical Manual]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Maraba Tev }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tev, Maraba}} [[Category:Alliance Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Spies]]
